security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be manipulated during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Data manipulation could alter vote results.

assumptions: The system does not employ data integrity checks for vote messages.
The actor has network-level access to intercept and modify vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement message integrity checks and encryption for vote transmission.

description: An attacker may intercept and modify vote data, altering the outcome of the proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of audit trail for votes

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes may be cast without verifiable proof of origin.

assumptions: The system does not provide a robust audit trail for votes.
The actor is able to cast votes anonymously.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a secure audit log to track all votes and their origin.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny responsibility for their actions.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes might be exposed due to lack of confidentiality.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Votes may be exposed if data is not properly protected.

assumptions: The system does not implement appropriate access controls for votes.
The actor has the capability to access or extract stored vote information.

mitigation.strategy: Implement appropriate access controls to protect vote confidentiality.

description: Sensitive information on vote selection may be leaked.
